title: dimocarpus fumatus
intro: Dimocarpus fumatus, also known as the Java plum or Jambolan, is a species of fruit-bearing tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its various medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dimocarpus fumatus include its ability to aid in weight loss, manage diabetes, and lower cholesterol levels. Dimocarpus fumatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is commonly consumed in its raw or dried fruit form.
